payload.answer: Not durably committed. The input yields four atomic, traceable candidate memory cards, but source provenance is missing. Preserve them as uncommitted candidates until durable source evidence is attached.

entity_resolution.reason: No concrete named entities requiring resolution were provided; extracted generic concepts only.

memory_cards.statement: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall.
The application database must own lifecycle and conflict state.

details: Parsed the input into four atomic candidate memory cards.
Kept claims separate to preserve traceability and avoid over-composition.
Deferred durable commit because no source evidence was supplied.

repair_options: Attach a durable source citation for the claims before committing.
Provide author, title, URL, or document identifier for traceability.
Optionally link all candidate cards to a single source record and then commit them atomically.
